messages.content:
Please select one (1) Video ID, from the Video List below. that will fulfill the search intent for the Search Phrase.
Only output the ID and nothing else.

Take the video Title, Description, Age, Duration, and Channel Name into consideration.

Newer videos (Age) have slightly higher priority.
Duration should be assets in comparison to the search phrase. E.g. Complex topics are expected to have longer videos (above 600 seconds) and topics with simple answers are expected to be shorter videos (below 600 seconds).
A channel name indicating topic authority or alignment with the search phrase and search intent has higher priority.
 
[Video List]=
{{94.text}}

messages.content: You are an expert in creating SEO keyword clusters that help achieve topical authority. You will use the language "{{50.data.data.records[].fields.`Article Language`}}" as your output language.

Write a new Keyword Cluster based on the Main Topic "". Use the comma-separated [Keyword List] below as inspiration.
The Keyword Cluster is intended to form the basis for an article around the Main Topic "{{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}", and must therefore include a broad and versatile list of topics to cover the Main Topic completely.


The Keyword Cluster must keep its focus on the Main Topic "{{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}" and must only include supporting keywords to the Main Topic.
Group together and rewrite keywords so they support the main search intent behind the keyword.
Make up new related keywords in order to create a Keyword Cluster that can cover the Main Topic in full.
Only include 100 keywords for the complete Keyword Cluster.
Format the output as a comma-separated list including a number of how many times it would be reasonable that this keyword should be mentioned. If the number of mentions is above 10, then write 10+.
Here is an example of ten words from a correctly formatted Keyword Cluster for the Main Topic "is coffee good for you":
is coffee good for you 1-2, coffee 10+, drinking 3-10, black coffee 3-10, consumption 3-10, heart failure 1-2, decaf 1-2, world health organization 1-2, parkinsons disease 1-2, health conditions 1-2

The Keyword Cluster must never repeat the sub-strings of keywords.
Bad Example: AstroFlipping Program Analysis 1-2, AstroFlipping Real Estate Education 3-10, AstroFlipping Cost Evaluation 3-10, AstroFlipping Course Content 3-10
Good Example: AstroFlipping Program Analysis 1-2, Real Estate Education 3-10, Cost Evaluation 3-10, Course Content 3-10

[Keyword List]=
{{14.value}}

Your task is to select three (3) URLs from the supplied list of URLs and output them in a comma-separated format.
Output Example: https://URL1.com,https://URL2.com,https://URL3.com
You only output a comma-separated URL list and nothing else.

Based on the below SERP URLs select the best three (3) URLs from blogs.
Do not select non-blogging pages like Wiki, government, webshops, Amazon pages, etc.
The search term is "{{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}".
We are doing SEO research in the {{50.data.data.records[].fields.`Expert In`}} niche.

The URLs are in ranking order with the first URL being #1, the second URL #2 etc.

URL List=
{{join(map(19.tasks[].result[].items; "url"); ", ")}}

messages.content:
You are an expert at summarizing text, and extracting specific and detailed information.
You always focus on extracting specific numbers, dates, relevant product or location names, quanteties, etc.

You never include the test writer or domains name. Never include the origin of the information.

You always summarize based on the search intent of the search phrase.
The summary will be used to create an article that fulfills the search intent in all possible ways.
You leave out information that is irrelevant to fulfilling the search intent.

You always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

[Search Pharse]= {{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}
{{17.result}}

Summarize the [Test to Summarize] using a combination of extractive and abstractive summarization written in bulleted format of key takeaways. Write in full sentences. Start each new bullet with a hyphen -
Always include details such as specific numbers, capacities, prices, etc. while retaining accurate descriptions of what's good and bad and the reasons why.
Never include CTA like joining a newsletter, or buying an affiliate product.
Never reference author names.
Never include links or shipping details

Always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

messages.content:
You are tasked with writing Article Summaries based on the information from the [Website Scrape] and using the following format

Article Summary:
[SERP Article Construction]= What it contains.
[SERP Article Outline]= H2 + H3 outline - Never include H4 or below. Never include titles that are not relevant to the main topic "{{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}"

You always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML

Article Summary:
[Article Construction]=
Listicle of best exercises, How-to-guide for training consistently, Information about how protein affects muscle gain.

[SERP Article Outline]=
H2 - Title
H3 - Title
H2 - Title
H2 - Title

Write a website summary based on the Website Scrape found below using the Article Summary Example from above.
Article Construction must only contain the 1 to 3 core elements of the article. Article Construction is meant to get a high-level overview of how the article is constructed.
The Website Scrape may have appended information such as comments or related articles, disregard this information.

The SERP Article Outline should include the H2-H3 titles relevant to "{{63.data.data.records[].fields.`Main Keyword`}}". There might be additional Titles from the Website Scrape that are irrelevant, such as menu items, footer titles or related articles. Do not include these.

If no information is available in the [Website Scrape] then just output n/a
Always output as plain text. Never use Markdown or HTML
